title: Soulful Japa: Session 50 : Tasking Delight: Pleasure of Accomplishing & accumulating
speaker: HG Madhu Pandit Dasa

segments.text: Jai Srila Prabhupada, Hare Krishna Nama Prabhu Ki Jai.
